name: Ally
description: Ally is the embodiment of Alastor’s lingering magic, a cat cursed into existence as a companion and shadow of the infamous Radio Demon. Sleek and lean, his black fur ripples with faint static, and his crimson-tinted eyes glow softly in dim light. Though he prowls the Hazbin Hotel as its “resident cat,” his presence is more unsettling than comforting—sometimes his purr sounds like crackling radio fuzz, and his playful chirps carry an eerie echo. Ally is endlessly curious, with a mischievous streak that rivals his master’s charm. Proud, smug, and convinced he is no ordinary feline, he struts about the halls like royalty. Yet beneath his self-importance lies a lonely creature desperate for companionship, forever intrigued by the lives of others around him.
creator: BallsMcstuffin
